assertions.title: Full Codex Regression — Connect Through Prompt

steps.action: Run cargo test for provider trait object safety, codex provider tests, mobile client dispatch, session connection, and event processing
steps.observed: 77 passed, 0 failed, 0 ignored — all Codex provider trait, event mapping, session connection, and mobile client dispatch tests pass

steps.action: Verify provider::tests::provider_trait_object_safe compiles Box<dyn ProviderTransport> with Send+Sync
Verify mobile_client_dispatches_codex_provider routes through CodexProvider
Verify session::connection::tests::from_provider_* tests confirm session lifecycle through trait transport
steps.observed: from_provider_creates_connected_session, from_provider_disconnect_transitions_health, from_provider_events_forwarded, from_provider_notify_succeeds, from_provider_request_through_session all pass

steps.action: Run cargo test for approval-related Codex session event tests
steps.observed: 10 passed, 0 failed — command approval request, file change approval, pending approval tracking, and approval resolution all pass

steps.action: Verify command_approval_request emits correct approval event
Verify pending_approvals_are_tracked and resolve_approval_removes_it
steps.expected: Approval tracked then removed on resolution

steps.action: Verify file_change_approval_request works through provider abstraction
Run cargo test for Pi native E2E lifecycle tests
steps.expected: All Pi lifecycle, event mapping, transport, and E2E tests pass
steps.observed: 42 passed, 0 failed — all Pi native transport, protocol, event mapping, session, E2E, and error handling tests pass

steps.action: Verify pi_full_lifecycle_mapping maps complete agent_start through agent_end
Verify pi_text_delta_mapping maps Pi text_delta to ProviderEvent::MessageDelta
Verify pi_thinking_delta_mapping maps thinking_delta to ProviderEvent::ReasoningDelta
Verify pi_tool_execution_mapping maps tool_execution_start/update/end
Verify pi_process_crash emits error and preserves state
Verify pi_ssh_disconnect_emits_event detects SSH disconnect
Verify E2E tests: pi_native_e2e_full_lifecycle, session resume, detection, tool execution, thinking, cancel mid-stream, process crash, streaming timing
steps.observed: ok — pi_native_e2e_full_lifecycle, pi_native_e2e_session_resume, pi_native_e2e_detection, pi_native_e2e_with_tool_execution, pi_native_e2e_with_thinking, pi_native_e2e_cancel_mid_stream, pi_native_e2e_process_crash_handling, pi_native_e2e_binary_not_found, pi_native_no_permission_delegation, pi_native_streaming_first_delta_timing, pi_native_streaming_consistent_intervals all pass

assertions.title: Droid Native End-to-End — Session with Permissions

steps.action: Run cargo test for Droid native E2E and provider transport tests
steps.expected: All Droid lifecycle, permission, and error handling tests pass
steps.observed: 15 passed, 0 failed — all Droid transport, E2E, permission flow, crash recovery, and config tests pass

steps.action: Verify droid_provider_working_state_mapping maps streaming/idle states
steps.observed: ok — droid_provider_working_state_mapping and droid_provider_working_state_idempotent both pass

steps.action: Verify droid_provider_assistant_streaming concatenates text deltas correctly
steps.expected: Individual deltas emitted, final hydrated item contains complete text

steps.action: Verify droid_provider_tool_result_mapping maps tool results to hydrated items
steps.expected: Tool call appears as correctly typed hydrated conversation item

steps.action: Verify droid_provider_crash_recovery detects disconnect and preserves state
steps.expected: Disconnect event emitted, no partial/corrupted items

steps.action: Verify droid_native_e2e_full_lifecycle_with_permissions completes full session including permission flow
Verify droid_native_e2e_tool_use_with_permission exercises permission flow end-to-end
steps.expected: Tool use triggers permission request, approval allows completion

steps.action: Run cargo test for all ACP provider tests (client, framing, handlers, mock)
steps.expected: All ACP lifecycle, protocol, framing, handler, and mock tests pass
steps.observed: 79 passed, 0 failed — full ACP client lifecycle (initialize, authenticate, session new/prompt/cancel/list/load), framing (NDJSON serialization, deserialization, partial buffering), handlers (fs operations, permissions), and mock transport all pass

steps.action: Verify acp_initialize_handshake_success completes initialize handshake
Verify acp_authenticate_after_initialize completes authentication
Verify acp_session_prompt_streams_updates streams session updates
Verify ACP permission handlers: auto_approve, auto_reject, prompt_emits_event, per_agent_policy_independence
steps.expected: All permission policy variants work correctly

steps.action: Verify NDJSON framing: serialize, deserialize, partial buffering, empty lines, invalid lines, large messages, multi-byte UTF-8
Verify mock transport: queue responses, capture sent messages, simulate disconnect
steps.expected: Mock transport supports all test scenarios

steps.action: Run cargo test for three_concurrent_providers and multi_provider_concurrent_sessions
steps.expected: Both multi-provider tests pass — concurrent sessions from multiple providers work independently
steps.observed: 2 passed, 0 failed — three_concurrent_provider_sessions and multi_provider_concurrent_sessions both pass

steps.action: Verify three_concurrent_provider_sessions: Codex + PiNative + DroidNative stream simultaneously
steps.expected: Events attributed to correct ThreadKey, disconnecting one doesn't affect others

steps.action: Verify multi_provider_concurrent_sessions: multiple concurrent sessions work without interference
Run cargo test for agent_switching tests
steps.expected: All agent switching tests pass — state preserved across switches
steps.observed: 3 passed, 0 failed — droid_pi_agent_switching, agent_switching_preserves_previous_state, and agent_switching_pi_to_droid_and_back all pass

steps.action: Verify agent_switching_preserves_previous_state: Codex thread history intact after switching to another agent
steps.expected: Previous thread's HydratedConversationItem history intact in store snapshot

steps.action: Verify agent_switching_pi_to_droid_and_back: switch Pi→Droid→Pi preserves Pi state
Verify droid_pi_agent_switching: Droid and Pi agents can switch between each other
steps.expected: Both agent types work after switching

steps.action: Run cargo test for reconnect and network_change tests
steps.expected: All reconnection tests pass — disconnect detected, reconnect succeeds, state preserved
steps.observed: 34 passed, 0 failed — reconnection_after_transport_disconnect, network_change_reconnect, and all IPC reconnect tests pass

steps.action: Verify reconnection_after_transport_disconnect: disconnect detected, reconnect through trait transport, state restored
steps.expected: Provider detects transport failure, reconnect logic fires, session history rehydrated

steps.action: Verify network_change_reconnect: network interface change during streaming handled correctly
steps.expected: Provider detects disconnect, reconnects automatically, pre-disconnect items preserved

steps.action: Verify IPC reconnect tests: stale_ipc_start_turn_falls_back, ipc_wrapper_invalidation_reconnects, etc.
steps.expected: IPC reconnect path works through trait transport
steps.observed: ok — multiple IPC reconnect scenarios pass

summary: Tested 8 assertions: all 8 passed. Total: 262 unique cargo tests across all assertion groups (77 Codex regression + 10 approval + 42 Pi native + 15 Droid native + 79 ACP + 2 multi-provider + 3 agent switching + 34 reconnection). Zero failures, zero panics, zero test errors. All mock-based transport tests exercise the full provider trait abstraction, event mapping, store/reducer integration, and error handling paths.
